title: Pan-Seared Chinese Dumplings
description: A simple and savory recipe for pan-seared Chinese dumplings with a creamy suet filling.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the melted suet and cook for 2 minutes, until slightly browned.
Add the dumplings to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the bottoms are golden brown.
Add the soy sauce (if using) and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the dumplings are cooked through.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with green onions if desired.
